title: Kureha Confronts Her Assistant
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on kureha confronts her assistant, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Confronts Her Assistant. Chopper finally accepts the invitation to join Luffy, leaving Kureha and Drum Island with fear and hope mixed together. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You're my one and only assistant!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Who was it that taught you all things related to medicine!? Or are you saying you don't feel the slightest bit in debt despite all that!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: N-No, that's not it! I'm grateful for everything you've done for me!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I consider myself very fortunate for having met with both you and the doc!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Then you better stay here.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You're not gonna find a castle as grand as this place to live in no matter where you go!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: and being a pirate ain't what it's cracked up to be!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You could be sailing just fine one day, and be a noting corpse the next!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I don't care!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Don't pretend to be tough! I've never even heard of a Reindeer venturing out to the seas before!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That's right, I am a rein- deer!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But even so!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm a man as well!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D=1_

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Cheeky little thing... I won't allow it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If you still won't change your mind, then it'll have to be over my dead body!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Remember someone else!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Dottress... Why can't you understand...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: A crybaby midget like you is calling yourself a man!? Don't be ridiculous!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: GTAARAA!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What's with all the yell- ing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just ignore it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's just focus on moving these cannons outside the castle,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stop right there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Unless you want Dr. Kureha coming after us with kitchen knives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I won't let you escape!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What's with all the noise inside?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Jeez... whoever's making so much noise should show some more class.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't they know others are trying to make a tearful good bye...?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, doctors!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Drag!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: But I want to go out and see the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just what do you think you can even accomplish by going out to the seas!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are you going to live out your days as deluded as that quack doctor!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: No, you're wrong...! Doc wasn't deluded!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: His research,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: was completed!

summary: This part highlights kureha confronts her assistant and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
